results.title: OpenClaw
results.body: OpenClaw (formerly Clawdbot, Moltbot, and Molty) is a free and open-source autonomous artificial intelligence agent that can execute tasks via large language models (LLMs), using messaging platforms as its main user interface.

results.title: GSD (OpenClaw)
results.body: GSD, standing for "Get Shit Done", is a skill/framework in OpenClaw, an open-source local autonomous AI agent. It implements a full project planning and execution workflow that enables the AI to act as a self-steering developer. Key capabilities inc…

results.title: OpenClaw — Personal AI Assistant
results.body: OpenClawThe AI that actually does things. Clears your inbox, sends emails, manages your calendar, checks you in for flights. All from WhatsApp, Telegram, or any chat app you already use. NewOpenClawPartners with VirusTotal for Skill Security →

results.body: Your personal, open source AI assistant.openclawhas 23 repositories available. Follow their code on GitHub.

results.title: Openclaw - Open-Source AI Automation Framework | Build Your Own AI ...
results.body: Openclawis an open-source AI automation framework for developers. Build programmable AI workflows, integrate with 50+ services, and deploy on your own infrastructure. MIT licensed.

results.title: OpenClaw | The AI That Actually Does Things
results.body: OpenClawis a free, open-source AI assistant that runs on your machine. Automate tasks across WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord, and 30+ platforms with Claude, GPT, or local models. 310k+ GitHub stars.
